title: Mixed Folder Images Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in source-native folder probe for Story 224's direct-folder grouped image-member parity slice. It mirrors the bounded ZIP grouped-image probe without a ZIP wrapper so the maintained lane can prove grouped route rows and one grouped `--input-images` launch on source-native folder entry while keeping relative member provenance and explicit blocked routing for the unsupported `.txt` member.

members.notes: This page belongs to the bounded direct-folder grouped image-member slice. The route rows should keep per-member provenance while sharing one grouped `--input-images` launch into `recipe-images-ocr-html-mvp.yaml`.
This second page proves the bounded shared-parent grouping contract and stable downstream page ordering on the source-native directory.
This unsupported text member exists to prove non-image members remain explicit blocked rows instead of being silently folded into the grouped image launch.

supported_scope: relative member manifest and grouped image-member route rows
one grouped `--input-images` launch into `recipe-images-ocr-html-mvp.yaml` for a shared-parent page-image set
explicit blocked rows for unsupported non-image members
known_gaps: No broad photo-album clustering or arbitrary image-set semantics
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-folder normalization into a single combined bundle
